title: [MTR4] NL Deco for MTR
body:
This resourcepack adds decoration objects based on those that can be found on the dutch transport network.
NTE is required for this pack to work on MTR version 3.2 and below, as they are eyecandy objects.
Please note that the text shown on the screenshots is not part of the model, but merely images projected on the objects using slideshow, which is the intended use of these objects.

Includes:

Bus shelters in the following variations:
- Small
- Large
- Small with white sidewalls (based on Utrecht rural bus stops)
- Large with RNET colors
- Large with blank adboard

Bus signs with:
- No info sign
- An info sign on the front
- An info sign on the side

Schedule info signs in the styles of the NS and the London Overground

Station name signs in the following variations:
- Standing
- Hanging
- Wall-mounted

Each of these come in the following schemes:
- NS Blue
- Moszyan Railways Silver
- RNET Red
- Overground Orange

Please read the readme file, I beg.
